title: [HandshakeToFIRRTL] Generate unique names for each instance op
body:
This is further work on cleaning up the output verilog from HandshakeToFIRRTL.
Previously, all instances of the same operation type would be named identically, leaving it up to the FIRRTL lowering to infer unique signal names. This resulted in unique IDs being added at the end of signals:
```
%handshake_buffer_in0, %handshake_buffer_out0, %handshake_buffer_clock, %handshake_buffer_reset = firrtl.instance handshake_buffer  @handshake_buffer_in_ui32_out_ui32_2slots_seq(in in0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>, data: uint<32>>, out out0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>, data: uint<32>>, in clock: !firrtl.clock, in reset: !firrtl.uint<1>)

%handshake_buffer_in0_0, %handshake_buffer_out0_1, %handshake_buffer_clock_2, %handshake_buffer_reset_3 = firrtl.instance handshake_buffer  @handshake_buffer_2slots_seq_1ins_1outs_ctrl(in in0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>>, out out0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>>, in clock: !firrtl.clock, in reset: !firrtl.uint<1>)

```

With this change, we preemptively generate a unique name for each operation instance, significantly cleaning up thing (and improving debugability!).
```mlir
%handshake_buffer0_in0, %handshake_buffer0_out0, %handshake_buffer0_clock, %handshake_buffer0_reset = firrtl.instance handshake_buffer0  @handshake_buffer_in_ui32_out_ui32_2slots_seq(in in0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>, data: uint<32>>, out out0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>, data: uint<32>>, in clock: !firrtl.clock, in reset: !firrtl.uint<1>)

%handshake_buffer1_in0, %handshake_buffer1_out0, %handshake_buffer1_clock, %handshake_buffer1_reset = firrtl.instance handshake_buffer1  @handshake_buffer_2slots_seq_1ins_1outs_ctrl(in in0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>>, out out0: !firrtl.bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready flip: uint<1>>, in clock: !firrtl.clock, in reset: !firrtl.uint<1>)
```
